name: on-becoming-a-person
description: Carl Rogers' foundational text of humanistic psychology — a toolkit for building helping relationships through genuineness, unconditional acceptance, and empathic understanding.
useCase: Deep listening, creating psychological safety, being authentic in relationships, supporting personal growth in others, understanding the fully functioning person.
knownRisks: Rogers' approach is highly effective for growth-oriented relationships but may not be sufficient alone for severe mental illness
The person-centered approach can be misinterpreted as passive or permissive — it requires active presence, not passivity
Some find Rogers' optimistic view of human nature naive or incomplete
